PostEdit.name: schema-change-reminder
PostEdit.command: echo '\n⚠️  Prisma schema changed. Run: npx prisma migrate dev --name <description> && npx prisma generate\nThen restart the backend container.'

PostEdit.name: new-endpoint-obs-check
PostEdit.command: echo '\n📊  New/modified controller detected. Run /check-obs to verify metrics, logging, and Sentry are wired.'

PreCommit.name: no-hardcoded-secrets
PreCommit.command: grep -rn 'SENTRY_DSN\s*=\s*["\x27]https' apps/ --include='*.ts' && echo '❌ Hardcoded Sentry DSN found — use env variable!' || true

PreCommit.name: no-console-log
PreCommit.command: grep -rn 'console\.log' apps/backend/src/ --include='*.ts' && echo '❌ console.log found in backend — use pino logger!' || true
